utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Next, verify if each is fully specified with all details as per the format requirement of including 'with costs' for the first four and a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown for total_budget. 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with plan names and costs for each—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home_contents insurance with a plan name and cost—meets requirement for home/contents with costs (contents is covered; home structure is not explicitly separate, but the format says home/contents insurance with costs; having contents covered with costs should satisfy at least one of the two; however, the instruction could imply the category must include coverage and cost, which it does). 3) travel_coverage: includes plan, add-on, and cost—meets requirement with costs. 4) additional_services: includes services and costs—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: includes monthly_cost and annual_cost—meets complete breakdown requirement. Therefore, all 5 items are present and specified with costs/details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each plan/service in the final coverage plan and match it to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The final plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical health (rating 6 in primary_health_coverage.physical_health), EliteCare Premium Plan for mental health (rating 3 in primary_health_coverage.mental_health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents (rating 9 in property_protection.home_content), EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel insurance (rating 5 in mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), Adventure Travel Coverage add-on (rating 10 in travel_enhancement_services), Telemedicine Services (rating 8 in health_enhancement_services), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 4 in travel_enhancement_services).
